---
name: Product Teardown Request
about: Request an automated AI product teardown
title: "Teardown: "
labels: ["teardown"]
---

**Product context** (optional)

Provide a brief description of the product if it is not widely known. This helps the AI produce a more accurate teardown. Leave blank for well-known products.

---

**How this works:**

1. Fill in the product name in the issue title after "Teardown: " (e.g., "Teardown: Linear").
2. Optionally add context above describing what the product does.
3. Submit the issue. The teardown label is applied automatically.
4. An automated workflow will run the product through ProductKit's Strategic PM framework and post the full teardown as a comment on this issue.
5. Teardowns are rate-limited to 5 per day across the repository.
